parameters.query:
INSERT INTO reembolsos_hotmart (
    id_reembolso, 
    id_transaccion_original, 
    email_cliente, 
    fecha_reembolso
) 
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.body.data.purchase.transaction }}', 
    '{{ $json.body.data.purchase.order_bump.parent_purchase_transaction }}', 
    '{{ $json.body.data.buyer.email }}', 
    '{{ $json.body.data.product.warranty_date }}'
);

UPDATE ventas_hotmart
SET 
    status = '{{ $('Info Hotmart').item.json.body.event }}',
    fecha_venta = '{{ $('Info Hotmart').item.json.body.data.product.warranty_date }}'
WHERE 
    id = '{{ $json.id }}';

value.metodo_pago:
={{    ({     'CREDIT_CARD': 'Tarjeta de Crédito',     'PSE': 'PSE',     'NEQUI': 'Nequi',     'BANCOLOMBIA': 'Bancolombia',     'BILLET': 'Efecty / Boleto',     'PIX': 'Pix',     'PAYPAL': 'PayPal',     'HOTMART_BALANCE': 'Saldo Hotmart',     'DIRECT_DEBIT': 'Transferencia Bancaria',     'GOOGLE_PAY': 'Google Pay'   })[$('Info Hotmart').item.json.body.data.purchase.payment.type] 

 $('Info Hotmart').item.json.body.data.purchase.payment.type  }}
